title: crotalaria lawalreeana
intro: Crotalaria lawalreeana, also known as the Lawalreeana bush calotrope or Lawalreeana crotolaria, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties that include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria lawalreeana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
